name: HolyHols
description: Connects Christian property owners with Christian holidaymakers. Browse listings and find somewhere that feels right.
key_features: Clergy discounts; Christian-owned properties; UK and international listings
business_model: Listing directory (property owners list for free or paid)

name: Christian House and Church Swap (CHACS)
description: UK-based holiday organisation running since 2003 with over 200 registered members. Facilitates home exchanges between Christians globally.
key_features: Home swap; Church swap; 200+ members; Global network; Affordable holidays

name: Christian Holiday Guide (Premier)
description: The go-to space for Christians seeking faith-based holiday experiences and accommodation. Part of Premier Christian media group.
key_features: Part of Premier media network; Holiday rentals; Retreats; Tour operators

name: OSCAR Holiday Directory
description: 128+ resources covering hotels; B&Bs; self-catering; camping; retreat houses; organised holidays; and festivals for Christian workers.
key_features: Comprehensive categories; Christian worker focus; Free to browse; 128+ listings

name: Christian Residential Network (CRNet)
description: Association representing over 200 Christian residential venues; conference centres; and camps across the UK. Includes holiday search.
key_features: 200+ member venues; Holiday search tool; Conference centres; Camps

name: The Retreat Association
description: Directory of retreat centres across the UK with interactive Google map. Lists upcoming retreats and retreat centre profiles.
key_features: Interactive map; Retreat centre directory; Upcoming retreats listing

name: Shunem Trust
description: Provides free or subsidised holiday accommodation for Christian workers; missionaries; and clergy needing rest and refreshment.
key_features: Free/subsidised holidays; For Christian workers; Charity-funded

name: Whitefield Christian Trust
description: Provides holiday accommodation and support for Christian workers and missionaries.

name: Boaters' Christian Fellowship
description: Network for Christians who enjoy the inland waterways. Includes membership directory and organises canal boat get-togethers.

name: Caravanners and Campers Christian Fellowship (CCCF)
description: Fellowship organising rallies across the UK where believers meet in tents and caravans for fellowship and worship.
key_features: Camping rallies; Motorhome friendly; Regional groups
